topWPAPlays.description: Trent Grisham homers (5) on a fly ball to right center field. Ryan McMahon scores.
Cody Bellinger homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field.

Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, third baseman Ryan McMahon to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Ward scores. Gunnar Henderson to 3rd. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.
Pete Alonso homers (6) on a fly ball to left field.
Cody Bellinger doubles (7) on a line drive to center fielder Blaze Alexander. Trent Grisham scores. Aaron Judge to 3rd.
Kazuma Okamoto singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Byron Buxton, deflected by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Ernie Clement scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 3rd.
Vladimir Guerrero Jr. walks. Ernie Clement to 2nd.
Brooks Lee singles on a ground ball to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Kody Clemens scores. Luke Keaschall scores. Throwing error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Kazuma Okamoto homers (8) on a fly ball to center field.

Twins challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Jesús Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Tristan Gray to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens. Brandon Valenzuela out at 2nd. Jesús Sánchez out at 1st.
Ian Happ homers (8) on a fly ball to right field.
Michael Busch doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Miguel Amaya to 3rd.
James McCann grounds out, third baseman Alex Bregman to first baseman Michael Busch.
Lourdes Gurriel Jr. doubles (2) on a fly ball to left fielder Ian Happ.
Alex Bregman flies out to center fielder Jorge Barrosa.
José Ramírez doubles (8) on a fly ball to center fielder Lawrence Butler. Steven Kwan scores. Angel Martínez scores.
Jacob Wilson doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Steven Kwan. Carlos Cortes to 3rd.
Shea Langeliers homers (9) on a fly ball to center field. Nick Kurtz scores.
Shea Langeliers homers (10) on a line drive to left center field.
David Fry homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Nathaniel Lowe hits a ground-rule double (5) on a fly ball to left field. JJ Bleday scores. Elly De La Cruz scores.
Ryan O'Hearn doubles (5) on a ground ball to right fielder Will Benson. Brandon Lowe scores. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd.
Elly De La Cruz doubles (6) on a ground ball to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn. JJ Bleday to 3rd.
Will Benson homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.
Sal Stewart strikes out swinging.
Brandon Lockridge singles on a ground ball to left fielder James Wood. Gary Sánchez scores. Jake Bauers scores. Luis Rengifo to 2nd.
José Tena hits a ground-rule double (2) on a line drive to left-center field.
Daylen Lile reaches on a fielding error by third baseman David Hamilton. Jacob Young to 2nd.
Luis Rengifo reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Brady House. William Contreras scores. Gary Sánchez to 3rd. Jake Bauers to 2nd.
José Tena strikes out swinging.
Willson Contreras grounds into a double play, shortstop Carlos Correa to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Jarren Duran out at 2nd. Willson Contreras out at 1st.
Brice Matthews homers (3) on a fly ball to center field. Christian Walker scores. Jose Altuve scores.
Ceddanne Rafaela called out on strikes.
Jose Altuve doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Christian Walker to 3rd.
Christian Walker singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Carlos Correa scores. Isaac Paredes to 2nd.
Agustín Ramírez walks. Kyle Stowers scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.
Connor Norby walks. Otto Lopez scores. Xavier Edwards to 3rd. Agustín Ramírez to 2nd.
Liam Hicks strikes out swinging.
Xavier Edwards homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.
Graham Pauley pops out softly to third baseman Alec Bohm in foul territory.
Jake Fraley singles on a fly ball to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Junior Caminero scores. Jonathan Aranda to 2nd.
Jonathan Aranda singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Junior Caminero to 3rd.
Jonathan Aranda singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Taylor Walls scores. Chandler Simpson scores. Cedric Mullins to 2nd.
Matt Chapman strikes out swinging and Casey Schmitt caught stealing 2nd, catcher Hunter Feduccia to second baseman Richie Palacios to catcher Hunter Feduccia.
Hunter Feduccia doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee, deflected by first baseman Rafael Devers.
Dalton Rushing strikes out swinging.
Jordan Walker homers (10) on a line drive to left field. Alec Burleson scores.
Alec Burleson doubles (9) on a ground ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Iván Herrera scores.
Shohei Ohtani lines into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Alex Freeland out at 1st.
Iván Herrera doubles (8) on a ground ball to left fielder Teoscar Hernández.
Dillon Dingler homers (6) on a fly ball to left field. Colt Keith scores. Riley Greene scores.

Danny Jansen grounds into a double play, third baseman Colt Keith to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Ezequiel Duran to 3rd. Josh Smith out at 2nd. Danny Jansen out at 1st.
Kevin McGonigle singles on a ground ball to center fielder Evan Carter. Wenceel Pérez scores.
Josh Smith singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Ezequiel Duran to 2nd.
Josh Jung doubles (12) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Corey Seager to 3rd.
Drake Baldwin homers (8) on a fly ball to left field. Ronald Acuña Jr. scores.
Jordan Beck doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Kyle Karros scores. Jordan Beck to 3rd.
Drake Baldwin doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Troy Johnston. Jorge Mateo scores. Eli White to 3rd.
Drake Baldwin singles on a ground ball to center fielder Brenton Doyle. Jorge Mateo scores.
Eli White singles on a soft bunt ground ball to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Austin Riley scores. Jorge Mateo to 2nd.
Miguel Vargas singles on a soft line drive to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Tristan Peters scores. Andrew Benintendi scores.
Xander Bogaerts walks. Jackson Merrill to 3rd. Manny Machado to 2nd.
Edgar Quero challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Gavin Sheets called out on strikes.
Edgar Quero grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Sam Antonacci out at 2nd. Edgar Quero out at 1st.
Miguel Andujar flies out to right fielder Jarred Kelenic.
Oswald Peraza singles on a line drive to center fielder Tyrone Taylor. Adam Frazier scores. Jorge Soler to 3rd. Jo Adell to 2nd.

Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, third baseman Oswald Peraza to second baseman Vaughn Grissom to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. MJ Melendez to 3rd. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.
Vaughn Grissom singles on a line drive to center fielder Tyrone Taylor. Jorge Soler scores. Jo Adell scores.
Vaughn Grissom flies out to right fielder Carson Benge.
Tyrone Taylor singles on a line drive to center fielder Mike Trout. Marcus Semien scores.

Jac Caglianone singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Lane Thomas scores. Jac Caglianone to 3rd. Jac Caglianone advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Isaac Collins grounds out softly, pitcher Andrés Muñoz to first baseman Josh Naylor.
Mitch Garver strikes out swinging.
J.P. Crawford grounds out, third baseman Maikel Garcia to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.
Leo Rivas strikes out swinging.
